title: Courier Variant Turnarounds
description: A reference-driven character-sheet series where one courier's identity is preserved across four production-style turnaround variants.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the courier's canonical face, body proportions, and sheet language. Images 02-04 keep the same person, four-view layout, and technical-diagram discipline while changing equipment, climate context, and costume function.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Courier Variant Turnarounds
en.description: A reference-driven character-sheet series where one courier's identity is preserved across four production-style turnaround variants.

zh-CN.title: 信使变体四视图
zh-CN.description: 以同一信使角色为基准，在四张工业化角色设定图中保持身份、比例和版式一致。
